| BE-AUDIT-2026-04-22-01 | 2026-04-22 | high | api 5xx error mapping and logging | locallife/api/middleware.go; locallife/api/casbin_enforcer.go; locallife/api/scan.go; locallife/api/membership.go; locallife/api/risk_management.go | Multiple handlers still return 5xx responses through `errorResponse(...)` instead of `internalError(...)` or `loggedServerError(...)`. That bypasses the intended structured logging boundary and `ctx.Error(...)` attachment, so request-scoped diagnostics can disappear, while callers may still receive generic or unstable 5xx envelopes. | Migrate these handler families to `internalError(ctx, err)` for 500 and `loggedServerError(ctx, err, publicMessage, logMessage)` for 503, keep public messages stable and non-sensitive, add focused tests for at least one 500 and one 503 path, then clear the remaining repo grep matches in staged batches. | open |

| BE-AUDIT-2026-05-29-01 | 2026-05-29 | high | Baofu reservation refund/share timing | locallife/db/query/profit_sharing_order.sql; locallife/worker/baofu_payment_recovery_scheduler.go; locallife/logic/baofu_profit_sharing_config.go; locallife/logic/reservation.go; locallife/logic/reservation_dishes.go; locallife/logic/replace_order.go; locallife/db/sqlc/profit_sharing_order_recovery_test.go | Baofu reservation and reservation_addon payment orders became ready for profit sharing while reservations were still in paid, confirmed, or checked_in states, but those same states still allowed cancellation refunds, dish-reduction refunds, or replacement-order refunds. If the five-minute recovery scheduler created and started profit sharing before the refund action, the shared Baofu refund guard correctly blocked later pre-share refunds, turning supported reservation actions into failed or manual-support paths. | Implemented on 2026-05-29: reservation profit sharing now requires merchant `completed` + `completed_at`, completion triggers local profit-sharing bill/enqueue with scheduler fallback, immediate/recovery bill creation reads active `profit_sharing_configs` for the reservation source, dish-change/replacement-order negative-delta refund creation is folded into guarded DB transactions, and successful partial refunds on `reservation`/`reservation_addon` payment orders now continue to share by net amount. Ordinary `order` payments remain outside this reservation fix and are still excluded after successful refunds. No historical-data migration was required because no affected historical records exist. | resolved |
